description: WKND Adventures metadata form for AEM Assets View (Settings > Metadata Forms). Build this form in the new Assets UI — not Tools > Assets > Metadata Schemas (legacy Admin View).

forms.name: WKND Adventures — Image
forms.notes: Optional: name the form 'image' instead if you want MIME-based auto-apply for all image uploads. The display name above is easier for authors.

fields.label: Title
fields.description: Display title and alt-text fallback for Edge Delivery pages.

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Caption or supporting copy when the asset is used in editorial content.

fields.label: Adventure category
fields.description: Aligns with page metadata adventureCategory (Analytics eVar4 segments).

fields.label: Content usage
fields.description: Where authors typically place this asset (multi-select). API/scripts must send a string array, e.g. ["blog","card"].

fields.label: Alt text
fields.description: Explicit accessibility text when different from Title.

fields.label: Asset status
fields.description: Must be Approved before Dynamic Media delivery via Asset Selector (copyMode: reference).

fields.label: Keywords
fields.description: Free-form search terms in addition to Smart Tags.

subfolders.title: Hero images
subfolders.description: Full-bleed hero backgrounds for adventures, blog, and landing pages.

subfolders.title: Adventure imagery
subfolders.description: Destination and activity photos for adventure detail pages.

subfolders.title: Activity imagery
subfolders.description: Activity-specific photos (climbing, cycling, water sports, etc.).

subfolders.title: Blog
subfolders.description: Inline and hero images for blog articles.
